calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-11-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
CRAIG CRAWFORD, Esq. (650.696.2580; ccrawford@carr-mcclellan.com) of CARR McCLELLAN P.C. for Petitioner via Zoom.
Brooks Hayden (208.781.8468; bh.haden@gmail.com) Respondent in propria persona.

The Court noted there was no compliance with tentative ruling rule but allowed oral argument.

ARGUED The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER JOHN DEDO'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award

The "petition to confirm arbitration award" is granted.

Order is signed.
Counsel for moving party to resubmit proposed judgment with compliance to CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
